data.title: Affected by the news of Upbit's listing, JTO rose by more than 20% in a short period of time, breaking through 4 USDT and then falling back
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that affected by the news that Upbit will launch JTO Korean won trading, market data showed that JTO rose in the short term and broke through 4 USDT before falling back, temporarily reporting 3.25 USDT, with a short-term increase of more than 20%.

data.title: PI 24-hour trading volume exceeds 1.2 billion US dollars, and Gate.io's trading share ranks first in the world
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CoinGecko data, PI's daily trading volume exceeded US$1.2 billion. Among them, Gate.io's trading volume exceeded US$540 million, accounting for 44.12% of the trading volume, ranking first in the world.

data.title: Upbit launches ARKM’s BTC and USDT trading pairs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Upbit will launch ARKM's BTC and USDT trading pairs at 17:00 on February 21. Deposit and withdrawal services are expected to be open within 2 hours after the announcement. Please note that only deposits and withdrawals of the Ethereum network are supported, and other networks will not be supported. After the transaction starts, buy orders will be restricted for about 5 minutes, and sell orders that are 10% lower than the previous day's closing price will also be restricted. In addition, within about 1 hour after the start of trading support, all types of orders except limit orders will be restricted. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: BitMEX launches KAITO and PI perpetual contracts, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, BitMEX announced the launch of KAITO and PI perpetual contracts, supporting up to 50x leverage.

data.title: Sonic Ecological Token SHADOW breaks through 210 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 53.71%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to CoinGecko data, Sonic's ecological token SHADOW has broken through 210 USDT and is currently trading at 215.16 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 53.71%.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$365 million yesterday, and the ETF net asset ratio reached 5.88%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 20, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$365 million. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a single-day net outflow of US$33.525 million, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is US$22.046 billion. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a single-day net outflow of US$61.1029 million, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is US$1.199 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was Bitwise ETF BITB, with a single-day net inflow of US$24.1428 million, and the current historical total net inflow of BITB reached US$2.187 billion. The second is VanEck ETF HODL, with a single-day net inflow of $4.1813 million. The current total net inflow of HODL has reached $867 million. 
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is $114.862 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Bitcoin's total market value) is 5.88%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $39.618 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $13.0915 million yesterday, the first net outflow after net inflows in the past 4 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 20, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 13.0915 million US dollars. Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of 10.3395 million US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 3.998 billion US dollars. Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 612 million US dollars. 
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 10.419 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.14%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 3.163 billion US dollars.

data.title: Hong Kong Lawmakers Explore Web3 And Virtual Assets At Consensus Conference
data.description: According to PANews, members of the Hong Kong Legislative Council's Subcommittee on Web3 and Virtual Asset Development recently attended the Consensus Conference. The delegation, including Subcommittee Chairman Ng Kit Chuang and members Ma Fung Kwok and Kan Wai Man, visited the international event focused on cryptocurrency, blockchain, and Web3 technologies held in Hong Kong. During the visit, lawmakers engaged with conference representatives to discuss the advancement of the Web3 ecosystem, the development of the cryptocurrency economy, and the expansion of business opportunities.

data.title: MOZ briefly broke through 0.037 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 23.27%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that MOZ briefly broke through 0.037 USDT and is now at 0.034 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 23.27%. 
Earlier news, Lumoz Chain mainnet was launched, and decentralized AI products started grayscale testing.

data.title: Story updates its technology roadmap and will soon launch new features such as IP portal, authentication service, IPkit, etc.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Story, a programmable IP public chain, has released its latest roadmap. It is expected to launch an IP portal and certification services in Q2 to simplify IP on-chain. In Q3, it will upgrade the main network and release IPKit to support developers in integrating IP functions. At the same time, Story is working with Stanford FDCI to explore cutting-edge technologies such as performance optimization and on-chain storage to promote the blockchainization of intellectual property.
